title: Maximum Distance in Arrays
titleCn: 数组列表中的最大距离

testcases.input: arrays = [[1,2,3],[4,5],[1,2,3]] Output: 4 Explanation: One way to reach the maximum distance 4 is to pick 1 in the first or third array and pick 5 in the second array.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: One way to reach the maximum distance 4 is to pick 1 in the first or third array and pick 5 in the second array.
